name: Corsair AIR 5400 RS-R ARGB Triple Chamber Mid-Tower Computer Case - White - Dual Curved Glass French Door Panels - Compatible with Reverse Connector Motherboards - 3x RS-R 120mm Reverse PWM ARGB Fans - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - 2x USB-C 3.2 (CC-9011319-WW)
shortName: Corsair AIR 5400 RS-R ARGB Triple Chamber Mid-Tower Computer Case
description: Triple-chamber mid-tower case in white with dual curved glass French doors, 3 ARGB fans, and advanced USB connectivity for gaming builds.
